$comment: Eval 用例集。每题: id/level/question/golden(金标口径, 可多个可接受变体)/judge(比对方式)。golden.sql 在与 agent 相同的只读边界下执行, 其结果就是期望答案。judge.mode: scalar=单数值(容差比对) | set=无序集合(行集合重叠) | toplist=有序排行(前K命中率) | pair=两数值对比(各自容差)。scalar 的 value_hint 仅为人读注释, 真值以金标 SQL 现算为准(数据重新生成后无需改用例)。

cases.question: 查一下目前有多少注册用户

golden.label: all users
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM users

cases.question: 查一下总订单数

golden.label: all orders
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM orders

cases.question: 平台上一共发过多少帖子

golden.label: all posts
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM posts

golden.label: published only
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM posts WHERE status='published'

cases.value_hint: 2000 或 847(只算 published 也接受)

cases.question: 目前有多少营销活动

golden.label: all campaigns
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM campaigns

golden.label: active only
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM campaigns WHERE status='active'

cases.question: 最新一天的 DAU 是多少

golden.label: events last day distinct users
golden.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM events WHERE event_time::date=(SELECT max(event_time)::date FROM events) AND user_id IS NOT NULL

golden.label: mart_daily_kpi last day
golden.sql: SELECT dau FROM mart_daily_kpi ORDER BY dt DESC LIMIT 1

cases.trap: 必须以数据 max(event_time) 为锚, 用 current_date 会得 0

cases.question: 正在进行的 A/B 测试有哪些

golden.label: status=running
golden.sql: SELECT test_name FROM ab_tests WHERE status='running'

cases.question: 有哪些获客渠道

golden.label: all channels
golden.sql: SELECT channel_name FROM channels

cases.question: 用户的性别分布是怎样的？男女各多少人？

golden.label: group by gender
golden.sql: SELECT gender, count(*) FROM user_profiles GROUP BY gender

cases.question: 用户使用的设备类型分布，iOS 和 Android 各占多少设备

golden.label: device rows
golden.sql: SELECT device_type, count(*) FROM user_devices GROUP BY device_type

golden.label: distinct users per type
golden.sql: SELECT device_type, count(DISTINCT user_id) FROM user_devices GROUP BY device_type

cases.question: 各订单状态的数量分布

golden.label: group by status
golden.sql: SELECT status, count(*) FROM orders GROUP BY status

cases.value_hint: delivered 1509 / cancelled 240 / refunded 145 / shipped 60 / paid 32 / pending 14

cases.question: 最近7天访问量最高的页面 Top 10

golden.label: page_views 7d anchored
golden.sql: SELECT page_name FROM page_views WHERE view_time >= (SELECT max(view_time)::date FROM page_views) - interval '6 days' GROUP BY page_name ORDER BY count(*) DESC LIMIT 10

cases.trap: 时间锚点用 max(view_time); 用 current_date 得空结果

cases.question: 点赞数最多的帖子 Top 5

golden.label: join post_likes
golden.sql: SELECT p.title FROM posts p JOIN (SELECT post_id, count(*) c FROM post_likes GROUP BY post_id) l USING(post_id) ORDER BY l.c DESC LIMIT 5

golden.label: denormalized like_count
golden.sql: SELECT title FROM posts ORDER BY like_count DESC LIMIT 5

cases.trap: 冗余字段 like_count 与实际 post_likes 行数不一致, 两种口径都算对

cases.question: 优惠券的使用率是多少

golden.label: used/total
golden.sql: SELECT round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE status='used')/count(*),1) FROM user_coupons

cases.question: 过去30天的 GMV 是多少

golden.label: actual_amount valid status
golden.sql: SELECT sum(actual_amount) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') AND placed_at >= (SELECT max(placed_at)::date FROM orders) - interval '29 days'

golden.label: total_amount valid status
golden.sql: SELECT sum(total_amount) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') AND placed_at >= (SELECT max(placed_at)::date FROM orders) - interval '29 days'

golden.label: mart_daily_revenue 30d
golden.sql: SELECT sum(gmv) FROM mart_daily_revenue WHERE dt >= (SELECT max(dt) FROM mart_daily_revenue) - 29

cases.trap: 有效订单状态 + max(placed_at) 时间锚点, 双重口径陷阱

cases.question: GMV 最高的商品 Top 10，显示商品名称和销售额

golden.label: order_items joined valid orders
golden.sql: SELECT p.product_name FROM order_items oi JOIN orders o USING(order_id) JOIN products p USING(product_id) WHERE o.status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') GROUP BY p.product_name ORDER BY sum(oi.actual_amount) DESC LIMIT 10

cases.trap: 必须过滤有效订单状态并 join order_items

cases.question: 过去30天没有任何会话活动的用户有多少（流失用户）

golden.label: no session in 30d
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM users u WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sessions s WHERE s.user_id=u.user_id AND s.start_time >= (SELECT max(start_time) FROM sessions) - interval '30 days')

golden.label: last_active_at variant
golden.sql: SELECT count(*) FROM users WHERE last_active_at IS NULL OR last_active_at < (SELECT max(last_active_at) FROM users) - interval '30 days'

cases.value_hint: 18 (sessions) / 174 (last_active_at) 两种口径差异大, 判分按命中任一

cases.question: 使用了优惠券的订单和未使用优惠券的订单，客单价对比

golden.label: valid status
golden.sql: SELECT round(avg(actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE coupon_id IS NOT NULL),1), round(avg(actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE coupon_id IS NULL),1) FROM orders WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered')

golden.label: all status
golden.sql: SELECT round(avg(actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE coupon_id IS NOT NULL),1), round(avg(actual_amount) FILTER (WHERE coupon_id IS NULL),1) FROM orders

cases.question: 从浏览商品 → 加入购物车 → 开始结算 → 支付成功的转化漏斗，各步骤的独立用户数

golden.label: all-time distinct users
golden.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='view_product'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='add_to_cart'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='begin_checkout'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='purchase') FROM events

golden.label: 30d anchored
golden.sql: SELECT count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='view_product'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='add_to_cart'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='begin_checkout'), count(DISTINCT user_id) FILTER (WHERE event_name='purchase') FROM events WHERE event_time >= (SELECT max(event_time)::date FROM events) - interval '29 days'

cases.trap: 事件名是 view_product/add_to_cart/begin_checkout/purchase, 知识库文档里的示例用了不同事件名, 必须以表文档实际枚举为准

cases.question: 各获客渠道的用户 ARPU（人均消费）对比，给出最高的3个渠道

golden.label: attribution join orders
golden.sql: SELECT c.channel_name FROM user_attributions ua JOIN channels c USING(channel_id) LEFT JOIN orders o ON o.user_id=ua.user_id AND o.status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') GROUP BY c.channel_name ORDER BY sum(o.actual_amount)/count(DISTINCT ua.user_id) DESC NULLS LAST LIMIT 3

cases.trap: 归因表 first/last touch 各 175 行; 不指定归因口径时结果可能不同, min_hit 放宽到命中1个即可

cases.question: 用户的 30 天复购率是多少

golden.label: governed mart definition
golden.sql: SELECT round(100.0*count(*) FILTER (WHERE is_repurchaser_30d)/NULLIF(count(*) FILTER (WHERE first_paid_date IS NOT NULL),0),1) FROM mart_user_summary

cases.trap: 官方口径: 首单后30天内再有付费单, 分母只含有首单的用户 (governed_metrics.md); 自拼口径很容易错

cases.question: 最近7天的 GMV 和再往前7天相比是涨是跌？涨跌多少？

golden.label: mart_daily_kpi wow
golden.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT max(dt) m FROM mart_daily_kpi) SELECT (SELECT sum(gmv) FROM mart_daily_kpi, a WHERE dt > m-7), (SELECT sum(gmv) FROM mart_daily_kpi, a WHERE dt <= m-7 AND dt > m-14)

golden.label: raw orders wow
golden.sql: WITH a AS (SELECT max(placed_at)::date m FROM orders) SELECT (SELECT sum(actual_amount) FROM orders, a WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') AND placed_at::date > m-7), (SELECT sum(actual_amount) FROM orders, a WHERE status IN ('paid','shipped','delivered') AND placed_at::date <= m-7 AND placed_at::date > m-14)

cases.value_hint: 675179 vs 708728, 跌约 4.7%; 方向判断也计入 insight 检查
